---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that does not work as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Configure platform '...'
2. Call tool '...' with input '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and tracebacks if applicable.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Python version: (e.g. 3.12.1)
- crosspost-mcp version: (e.g. v0.1.0)
- MCP client: (e.g. Claude Desktop, Cursor, MCP Inspector)

## Additional context

Any other information that might be helpful, such as logs, screenshots, or
configuration snippets (redact secrets).
